sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107286" key="u(pera/steios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπεράστειος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n107286.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">exceedingly polished</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">witty,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1392.tlg001:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hegesand.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
